testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 0 when the culture is null or undefined
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 0 when the culture is null or undefined

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 0 when there is no engagement signal of any kind
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 0 when there is no engagement signal of any kind

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 1 (silver) for stories-saved-only
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 1 (silver) for stories-saved-only

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 1 (silver) when rarity is silver even with zero counters
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 1 (silver) when rarity is silver even with zero counters

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 2 (bronze) for at least one recipe tried
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 2 (bronze) for at least one recipe tried

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 2 (bronze) when rarity is bronze
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 2 (bronze) when rarity is bronze

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 3 (emerald) for an explicit heritage_recipes count
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 3 (emerald) for an explicit heritage_recipes count

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 3 (emerald) when rarity is emerald or gold
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 3 (emerald) when rarity is emerald or gold

testcase.classname: engagementLevel returns 4 (legendary) and prefers it over every other signal
testcase.name: engagementLevel returns 4 (legendary) and prefers it over every other signal

testcase.classname: engagementLevel falls back to counters when the rarity string is unknown
testcase.name: engagementLevel falls back to counters when the rarity string is unknown

testcase.classname: engagementLevel accepts the raw backend keys (`culture` + `rarity`)
testcase.name: engagementLevel accepts the raw backend keys (`culture` + `rarity`)

testcase.classname: engagementLevel tolerates missing optional fields without throwing
testcase.name: engagementLevel tolerates missing optional fields without throwing

testcase.classname: engagementLevel rarity is case-insensitive
testcase.name: engagementLevel rarity is case-insensitive

testcase.classname: colorForLevel returns null for level 0
testcase.name: colorForLevel returns null for level 0

testcase.classname: colorForLevel returns silver / bronze / emerald / purple for levels 1..4
testcase.name: colorForLevel returns silver / bronze / emerald / purple for levels 1..4

testcase.classname: colorForLevel exports the same colours via ENGAGEMENT_COLORS
testcase.name: colorForLevel exports the same colours via ENGAGEMENT_COLORS

testcase.classname: normalizeEvent maps backend description+timestamp into message+created_at
testcase.name: normalizeEvent maps backend description+timestamp into message+created_at

testcase.classname: normalizeEvent falls back to `type` when `event_type` is absent
testcase.name: normalizeEvent falls back to `type` when `event_type` is absent

testcase.classname: normalizeEvent returns null when id is missing
testcase.name: normalizeEvent returns null when id is missing

testcase.classname: fetchTimeline — dedicated endpoint path returns events and walks the DRF `next` link as the cursor
testcase.name: fetchTimeline — dedicated endpoint path returns events and walks the DRF `next` link as the cursor

testcase.classname: fetchTimeline — dedicated endpoint path returns nextCursor null when there is no more data
testcase.name: fetchTimeline — dedicated endpoint path returns nextCursor null when there is no more data

testcase.classname: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport falls back to the passport endpoint on 404 and chunks 20 per page
testcase.name: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport falls back to the passport endpoint on 404 and chunks 20 per page

testcase.classname: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport returns an empty page when the passport has no timeline
testcase.name: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport returns an empty page when the passport has no timeline

testcase.classname: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport propagates non-404 errors from the dedicated endpoint
testcase.name: fetchTimeline — fallback to full passport propagates non-404 errors from the dedicated endpoint

testcase.classname: fetchRegionPins prefers backend lat/lng but falls back to the regionGeo table when missing
testcase.name: fetchRegionPins prefers backend lat/lng but falls back to the regionGeo table when missing

testcase.classname: fetchRegionPins defaults recipeCount to 0 when content_count is missing
testcase.name: fetchRegionPins defaults recipeCount to 0 when content_count is missing

testcase.classname: fetchRegionRecipes walks pagination and splits recipes into located vs unlocated
testcase.name: fetchRegionRecipes walks pagination and splits recipes into located vs unlocated

testcase.classname: fetchRegionRecipes falls back to regionGeo centroid when backend metadata lookup fails
testcase.name: fetchRegionRecipes falls back to regionGeo centroid when backend metadata lookup fails

testcase.classname: parseQuest flattens backend fields into the Quest shape
testcase.name: parseQuest flattens backend fields into the Quest shape

testcase.classname: parseQuest formats points rewards with a "points" suffix
testcase.name: parseQuest formats points rewards with a "points" suffix

testcase.classname: parseQuest marks completed when completed_at is set, and surfaces event_end for event quests
testcase.name: parseQuest marks completed when completed_at is set, and surfaces event_end for event quests

testcase.classname: parseQuest defaults numeric and string fields when raw values are missing or unparseable
testcase.name: parseQuest defaults numeric and string fields when raw values are missing or unparseable

testcase.classname: parseQuest coerces string numerics defensively
testcase.name: parseQuest coerces string numerics defensively

testcase.classname: fetchQuests handles a bare array response (unpaginated)
testcase.name: fetchQuests handles a bare array response (unpaginated)

testcase.classname: fetchQuests walks DRF pagination, combining results across pages
testcase.name: fetchQuests walks DRF pagination, combining results across pages

testcase.classname: fetchQuests returns an empty array when results is missing
testcase.name: fetchQuests returns an empty array when results is missing

testcase.classname: groupQuests routes completed quests into the completed bucket
testcase.name: groupQuests routes completed quests into the completed bucket

testcase.classname: groupQuests moves a quest between sections when is_completed flips
testcase.name: groupQuests moves a quest between sections when is_completed flips

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> shows the empty state when there are no active quests
testcase.name: <QuestList /> shows the empty state when there are no active quests

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> renders an active and a completed section with count badges
testcase.name: <QuestList /> renders an active and a completed section with count badges

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> renders the progress text "<current> / <target>" on each card
testcase.name: <QuestList /> renders the progress text "<current> / <target>" on each card

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> shows the reward chip when the quest has a reward
testcase.name: <QuestList /> shows the reward chip when the quest has a reward

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> renders the countdown for active event quests with a future end date
testcase.name: <QuestList /> renders the countdown for active event quests with a future end date

testcase.classname: <QuestList /> exposes accessibilityRole=progressbar on the progress track
testcase.name: <QuestList /> exposes accessibilityRole=progressbar on the progress track

testcase.classname: StampCard renders earned stamp with name, rarity label and MMM YYYY date
testcase.name: StampCard renders earned stamp with name, rarity label and MMM YYYY date

testcase.classname: StampCard renders locked stamp with 🔒 instead of date
testcase.name: StampCard renders locked stamp with 🔒 instead of date

testcase.classname: StampCard respects explicit locked prop over earned_at
testcase.name: StampCard respects explicit locked prop over earned_at

testcase.classname: StampCard exposes accessibilityLabel with name, rarity and earned status
testcase.name: StampCard exposes accessibilityLabel with name, rarity and earned status

testcase.classname: StampCard exposes accessibilityLabel with locked status when locked
testcase.name: StampCard exposes accessibilityLabel with locked status when locked

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours applies the bronze colour as the card border
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours applies the bronze colour as the card border

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours applies the silver colour as the card border
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours applies the silver colour as the card border

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours applies the gold colour as the card border
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours applies the gold colour as the card border

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours applies the emerald colour as the card border
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours applies the emerald colour as the card border

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours applies the legendary colour as the card border
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours applies the legendary colour as the card border

testcase.classname: StampCard rarity colours falls back to a default border colour for unknown rarities
testcase.name: StampCard rarity colours falls back to a default border colour for unknown rarities

testcase.classname: StampCollection renders the empty state when there are no stamps
testcase.name: StampCollection renders the empty state when there are no stamps

testcase.classname: StampCollection renders a loading state when loading
testcase.name: StampCollection renders a loading state when loading

testcase.classname: StampCollection groups stamps by category and renders a section title per category
testcase.name: StampCollection groups stamps by category and renders a section title per category

testcase.classname: StampCollection renders all category sections always open (no accordion)
testcase.name: StampCollection renders all category sections always open (no accordion)

testcase.classname: StampCollection puts each stamp inside its category grid as a StampCard
testcase.name: StampCollection puts each stamp inside its category grid as a StampCard

testcase.classname: StampCollection formats earned date as "MMM YYYY"
testcase.name: StampCollection formats earned date as "MMM YYYY"

testcase.classname: StampCollection renders locked stamps with a lock glyph and no date
testcase.name: StampCollection renders locked stamps with a lock glyph and no date

testcase.classname: StampCollection exposes accessibility labels with name, rarity and status
testcase.name: StampCollection exposes accessibility labels with name, rarity and status

testcase.classname: normalizeStamp aliases backend culture/kind/unlocked_at keys
testcase.name: normalizeStamp aliases backend culture/kind/unlocked_at keys

testcase.classname: normalizeStamp prefers explicit name/category/rarity/earned_at when present
testcase.name: normalizeStamp prefers explicit name/category/rarity/earned_at when present

testcase.classname: normalizeStamp preserves source_recipe and source_story from API-shaped rows

testcase.classname: normalizeStamp falls back to safe defaults for missing fields
testcase.name: normalizeStamp falls back to safe defaults for missing fields

testcase.name: recipeAndStoryIdsForCulture returns nulls when stamps are missing

testcase.classname: recipeAndStoryIdsForCulture matches stamp culture name case-insensitively and prefers latest earned
testcase.name: recipeAndStoryIdsForCulture matches stamp culture name case-insensitively and prefers latest earned

testcase.name: PassportWorldMap renders one Marker per culture with engagement + known coords

testcase.classname: PassportWorldMap skips cultures with no engagement (level 0)
testcase.name: PassportWorldMap skips cultures with no engagement (level 0)

testcase.classname: PassportWorldMap skips cultures whose name has no regionGeo centroid
testcase.name: PassportWorldMap skips cultures whose name has no regionGeo centroid

testcase.classname: PassportWorldMap colours each pin by engagement level (silver / bronze / emerald / purple)
testcase.name: PassportWorldMap colours each pin by engagement level (silver / bronze / emerald / purple)

testcase.classname: PassportWorldMap renders the empty banner when no pins are placeable
testcase.name: PassportWorldMap renders the empty banner when no pins are placeable

testcase.classname: PassportWorldMap opens selection card on marker press and shows link buttons when stamps have ids

testcase.name: resolveTheme resolves an exact catalogue name

testcase.name: resolveTheme resolves calendar-based themes by name

testcase.name: resolveTheme falls back when active is null/undefined/empty

testcase.name: parseEventDate parses a fixed:MM-DD rule into a Gregorian label

testcase.classname: parseEventDate clamps an out-of-range fixed month to a valid index
testcase.name: parseEventDate clamps an out-of-range fixed month to a valid index

testcase.classname: parseEventDate returns a passthrough label when the fixed parts are not numeric
testcase.name: parseEventDate returns a passthrough label when the fixed parts are not numeric

testcase.classname: parseEventDate returns lunarUnresolved when the year has no entry
testcase.name: parseEventDate returns lunarUnresolved when the year has no entry

testcase.name: parseEventDate prettifies multi-word lunar keys

testcase.name: parseEventDate returns the trimmed rule for unrecognised prefixes

testcase.classname: parseEventDate exports 12 month labels in order
testcase.name: parseEventDate exports 12 month labels in order

testcase.name: trimStepsForPayload returns an empty array when nothing survives the trim

testcase.name: RecipeStepsRepeater renders the empty hint and no rows when steps is empty

testcase.name: RecipeStepsRepeater removes the targeted row

testcase.name: RecipeStepsRepeater reorders rows with the down control

testcase.name: coordsForRegion returns coordinates for a known region

testcase.name: coordsForRegion returns coordinates for a multi-word region name

testcase.name: coordsForRegion returns null for an unknown region

testcase.name: coordsForRegion is case-sensitive (lookup uses exact keys)

testcase.name: formatCountdown returns "Event ended" when the end has passed

testcase.name: formatCountdown returns "Event ended" exactly at the boundary

testcase.name: JourneyTimeline renders the correct icon for each event type

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline calls fetchTimeline once when initialEvents is supplied (pagination sync)
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline calls fetchTimeline once when initialEvents is supplied (pagination sync)

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline embeddedInParentScroll shows Refresh journey and Load more when API has next page
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline embeddedInParentScroll shows Refresh journey and Load more when API has next page

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline fetches on mount when no initialEvents are supplied
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline fetches on mount when no initialEvents are supplied

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline renders a Recipe pill when payload has related_recipe and tapping navigates
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline renders a Recipe pill when payload has related_recipe and tapping navigates

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline renders both Recipe and Story pills when both ids are present
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline renders both Recipe and Story pills when both ids are present

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline renders no pill when payload has no related ids
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline renders no pill when payload has no related ids

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline skips the Recipe pill when the message already mentions Recipe #
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline skips the Recipe pill when the message already mentions Recipe #

testcase.classname: JourneyTimeline renders a time-ago label for recent events
testcase.name: JourneyTimeline renders a time-ago label for recent events

testcase.classname: EditProfileScreen renders the fetched profile and prefills the bio and region inputs
testcase.name: EditProfileScreen renders the fetched profile and prefills the bio and region inputs

testcase.classname: EditProfileScreen calls updateOwnProfile with only the changed fields and navigates back on save
testcase.name: EditProfileScreen calls updateOwnProfile with only the changed fields and navigates back on save

testcase.classname: HomeScreen notifications bell renders the bell for anonymous users and routes to Login on press
testcase.name: HomeScreen notifications bell renders the bell for anonymous users and routes to Login on press

testcase.classname: HomeScreen notifications bell renders the bell for authenticated users and routes to Notifications on press
testcase.name: HomeScreen notifications bell renders the bell for authenticated users and routes to Notifications on press
